entity.summary: Decentralized derivatives exchange protocol historically deployed across Base and OP Mainnet, with protocol liquidity still represented on-chain while the current first-party public surface promotes a V2 waitlist rather than open trading access.
entity.notes: The current first-party FXDX website is reachable but presents V2 and a Join waitlist action rather than a live trading interface. DefiLlama continues to report protocol TVL across Base and OP Mainnet and cumulative DEX volume. HEI therefore classifies FXDX as limited instead of active pending evidence of reopened public trading.

evidence.title: FXDX official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website is reachable but presents a V2 Join waitlist surface rather than an open public trading interface, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: FXDX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies FXDX as a perpetual futures decentralized exchange, reports TVL across Base and OP Mainnet, and records cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: FXDX DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FXDX across OP Mainnet and Base; current first-party access state remains the authority for limited classification.
